---
title: "MAD213 Basic Statistics" 
description: "Lecture notes"
date: 2020-12-25T07:00:00-03:00
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
        collapsed: true
        smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    fig_caption: yes
    code_folding: show
    number_sections: true

fontsize: 14pt
tags: []
comments: false
---

Dear all,

Lecture notes of previous weeks' are available [December 4th](/upload/mad213t_w06_dec04.pdf), [December 11th](/upload/mad213t_w07_dec11.pdf).

Today's notes are available [here](/upload/mad213t_w08_dec25.pdf).

Good luck,

`r emo::ji("sun")` GERTUNC `r emo::ji("bar_chart")`
